title: Gap Assessment vs Full GMP Audit
alt: Side-by-side comparison of a GMP gap assessment and a full GMP audit

left.heading: Gap Assessment
points: Plans improvement, not a compliance verdict
Benchmarks current state against key requirements
Best when the site is new or recently changed

right.heading: Full GMP Audit
points: Verifies compliance against the full standard
Samples records and observes actual practice
Best when formal, defensible assurance is needed
